text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to change... from the good-for-nothing
person I am now... into someone who can bring
happiness to everyone...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-so please... help me out with that, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-so please... help me out with that, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
